extract: Sleep Talk (Japanese: ねごと Sleep Talk) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM35 in Generation II. TM82 in Generation IV and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM88 from Generation VI to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon. TR27 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM070 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet.
